MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-08-2022 IN 206, PLAINTIFF JAMES SANABRIA'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AS STIPULATED TO BY THE PARTIES WAS HEARD. MATTHEW GRAMLY, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF JAMES SANABRIA. MICHAEL WALKER, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT WALSH CONSTRUCTION COMPANY II, LLC. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 12/05/22 IS CONTINUED TO 05/30/23 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM PER STIPULATION. ALL DISCOVERY TO TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES ABSENT GOOD CAUSE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF TO SERVE ORDER. IF PARTIES WISH TO SCHEDULE A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, COUNSEL TO CONTACT THE COURT'S ADR COORDINATOR, ELIZABETH KELBER, VIA THE E-MAIL ADDRESS PROVIDED AT THE HEARING.
